# Activity Lecture 1 {#sec-week1}

Name:

## Descriptive Statistics

-   Read sections 1.1 1.2 of [r4ds](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-visualize.html) and solve 1.2.5 excercises 2,3, and 7.

-   Analyze the variable flipper_length_mm in palmerpenguins/penguins by displaying the measures of center and disperson. Why the measures of center differ?

-   Multiply the variable by 10 and recompute the variance and the coefficient of variation. What do you conclude?

-   Change the third observation of the variable from 195 to 1000 and recompute the measures of center. What do you conclude?

-   Read section 1.4 and display the histogram of flipper_length_mm. What is the shape of the distribution? What can you conclude? How does this support your conclusion of previous points?

-   What are the quartiles?

<!-- are the valuees that divide the area into four equal parts -->
